description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this feminine top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details Yellow printed sleeveless top with tiered ruffles around the sleeves, has lace detailing at the sides of the waist and a round neckline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
